name: ai-native-os
description: The open operating system for building an AI-native company: Handbook, Dictionary, skills, flows, loops, and advisor agents. Codex reads AGENTS.md as the master instructions; skills live in skills/. Theme-agnostic.
author: Adam M. Adamek (Impact Brussels ASBL)

interface.shortDescription: Frame, architect, build, trust, ship, grow, defend an AI-native company
